name: The Other Side of the Frostmoon
title: The Other Side of the Frostmoon
desc: "We are all tainted by sin... How could we ever hope to behold the moonlight in its purest form?"

skills.desc:
When played, and at the start of each Action Phase: Attach Cost Reduction to 1 random card in your Hand.
(Only one "Arcane Legend" card can be played per match. This card will be in your starting hand.)
